nodes.description: Transparent-screen device frame PNG for iPhone 15 Pro in Natural Titanium finish. The screen area is fully transparent to allow recorded video to show through. Features a thin metallic bezel with natural titanium beige/gold hue, Dynamic Island cutout at the top of the display area, and rounded corners matching the device profile.

nodes.label: iPhone 15 Pro Black Titanium Device Frame
nodes.source_file: Maya/Assets.xcassets/iphone frames/iPhone 15 Pro - Black Titanium.imageset/iPhone 15 Pro - Black Titanium.png
nodes.description: Transparent-screen device frame PNG for iPhone 15 Pro in Black Titanium finish. The screen area is fully transparent. Features a dark metallic bezel with black titanium coloring, Dynamic Island cutout at the top, and the same overall form factor as other iPhone 15 Pro color variants.

nodes.label: iPhone 16 Pro White Titanium Device Frame
nodes.source_file: Maya/Assets.xcassets/iphone frames/iPhone 16 Pro - White Titanium.imageset/iPhone 16 Pro - White Titanium.png
nodes.description: Transparent-screen device frame PNG for iPhone 16 Pro in White Titanium finish. The screen area is fully transparent. Features a white/silver titanium metallic bezel, Dynamic Island cutout, and subtle camera bump outline. The iPhone 16 Pro represents Apple's 2024 flagship phone generation.

nodes.label: MacBook Pro 14-inch Device Frame
nodes.description: Transparent-screen device frame PNG for MacBook Pro 14-inch in Space Gray finish. The screen area is fully transparent to allow recorded content to show through. Features a thin bezel around the display, a notch at the top center housing the webcam, and a visible keyboard deck below the screen area including speaker grilles. Unlike the iPhone frames, this is a laptop form factor with a visible base/chassis.
screen_features: notch at top center for webcam

nodes.label: iPhone 15 Pro device model
nodes.description: The iPhone 15 Pro smartphone model from Apple, released in September 2023. In the Maya app, this device is represented by four frame color variants (default, Black Titanium, Natural Titanium, White Titanium) each with a transparent screen area for compositing screen recordings behind the bezel.

nodes.label: iphone frames
nodes.description: Asset catalog folder containing all iPhone device frame PNGs with transparent screens for wrapping recordings

nodes.label: iPhone 16 Pro - Gold Titanium Frame PNG
nodes.source_file: Maya/Assets.xcassets/iphone frames/iPhone 16 Pro - Gold Titanium.imageset/iPhone 16 Pro - Gold Titanium.png
nodes.summary: A gold (Desert Titanium) iPhone 16 Pro device frame PNG with a fully transparent screen cutout. The device has a square triple-camera bump on the upper-left back. Frame dimensions: 450×920px. Screen cutout: 402×874px at offset (24, 23) in PNG coordinates. Used as a compositing overlay in Maya's video wrapping pipeline — the transparent screen region reveals the user's recording placed behind the frame.

nodes.label: iPhone 17 Pro - Cosmic Orange Frame PNG
nodes.source_file: Maya/Assets.xcassets/iphone frames/iPhone 17 Pro - Cosmic Orange.imageset/iPhone 17 Pro - Cosmic Orange.png
nodes.summary: A Cosmic Orange (copper-orange) iPhone 17 Pro device frame PNG with a fully transparent screen cutout. The device features the distinct iPhone 17 Pro horizontal pill-shaped camera bar across the top back. Frame dimensions: 450×920px. Screen cutout: 402×874px at offset (24, 23) in PNG coordinates — identical geometry to iPhone 16 Pro. Used as a compositing overlay where the transparent screen region reveals the user's recording.
nodes.camera_design: horizontal pill-shaped camera bar (across top back)

nodes.label: iPhone 17 Pro - Silver Frame PNG
nodes.source_file: Maya/Assets.xcassets/iphone frames/iPhone 17 Pro - Silver.imageset/iPhone 17 Pro - Silver.png
nodes.summary: A Silver iPhone 17 Pro device frame PNG with a fully transparent screen cutout. The device features the iPhone 17 Pro horizontal pill-shaped camera bar across the top back. Frame dimensions: 450×920px. Screen cutout: 402×874px at offset (24, 23) in PNG coordinates — identical geometry to iPhone 16 Pro. Used as a compositing overlay where the transparent screen region reveals the user's recording.
nodes.camera_design: horizontal pill-shaped camera bar (across top back)

nodes.label: iPhone 16 Pro DeviceModel
nodes.summary: DeviceModel entry for iPhone 16 Pro. Shares the same rasterization geometry as iPhone 17 Pro (450×920 frame, 402×874 screen). Has 4 color variants: Natural Titanium, Black Titanium, White Titanium, and Desert Titanium (Gold). The gold variant uses the imageName 'iPhone 16 Pro - Gold Titanium' and swatch hex #C9A77F. Appears third in the DeviceModel.all list, after iPhone 17 Pro.

nodes.label: iPhone 17 Pro DeviceModel
nodes.summary: DeviceModel entry for iPhone 17 Pro. Shares the same rasterization geometry as iPhone 16 Pro (450×920 frame, 402×874 screen). Has 3 color variants: Cosmic Orange, Deep Blue, and Silver. The cosmic orange variant uses swatch hex #E96A2C; silver uses #C9CCD0. Appears first in the DeviceModel.all list (after none and generic).

nodes.label: iPhone 16 Pro / 17 Pro Shared Frame Geometry
nodes.summary: Both iPhone 16 Pro and 17 Pro frame assets share identical rasterization: 450×920px PNG frame dimensions, with a 402×874px screen cutout positioned at (24, 23) in PNG coordinates, and a screen corner radius of 60px (normalized 60/450). This shared geometry allows the same compositing math to work for both models.

nodes.label: Device Frame Compositing Pipeline
nodes.summary: The device frame PNGs with transparent screens are used as overlays in Maya's rendering pipeline. The user's screen recording video is composited behind the transparent screen cutout. The screen rect (stored as normalized coordinates in screenRectNormalized) maps the video to the exact screen area. A corner radius mask (screenCornerRadiusNormalized) clips the video corners to match the device bezel curves. This compositing happens both in the preview (CanvasView) and in the export pipeline (DeviceFrameCompositor).

nodes.label: iPhone 16 Pro vs 17 Pro Camera Design
nodes.summary: The iPhone 16 Pro frame features Apple's traditional square camera bump with three lenses arranged in a triangle in the upper-left corner of the back. The iPhone 17 Pro frame features Apple's redesigned horizontal pill-shaped camera bar that spans across the top of the back. This is the primary visual distinction between the two device frame series.
nodes.iphone_17_pro_camera: horizontal pill-shaped camera bar (across top back)

hyperedges.label: iPhone Pro Device Models (15/16/17 Pro + Generic + None + MacBook Pro)
Zoom Animation System (Segment + Focus + Curve + Presets)
Release Pipeline (Script + CI Workflow + Docs + Website Download)
Canvas Preview Pipeline
hyperedges.description: FramedDeviceView uses AnimationSampler to compute effective scale/offset per frame, VideoPlayerNSView to display the AVPlayer video layer, and DeviceFrameOverlay to draw the device bezel/PNG on top — together rendering the interactive framed phone preview with live zoom animations.

hyperedges.label: Export Pipeline
hyperedges.description: ExportService takes a Snapshot from Project, builds a DeviceFrameCompositionInstruction, and invokes DeviceFrameCompositor (as custom AVVideoCompositing) to render every frame — with background/blur from BlurPosterCache, frame overlay from FrameOverlayProvider, and animation sampling via AnimationSampler. Two export paths: AVAssetExportSession for MP4 with background, AVAssetReader/Writer for HEVC+alpha MOV.

hyperedges.label: Timeline Editing
hyperedges.description: TimelineView coordinates AnimationsTrack (zoom segment blocks with drag/resize/snap), TrimmableVideoClip (yellow trim handles with body-drag), and a draggable Playhead — all mapping between source time and timeline time via Project to provide an NLE-style editing experience.

hyperedges.label: iPhone 15 Pro device frame color variant set
hyperedges.description: The complete set of four iPhone 15 Pro device frame color variants (default, Black Titanium, Natural Titanium, White Titanium) available in the Maya app's asset catalog for wrapping screen recordings.

hyperedges.label: iPhone 16 Pro Device Frame Color Set

hyperedges.label: Device Frame Compositor Pipeline
hyperedges.description: Frame PNGs used by DeviceFrameCompositor during export: background -> shadow -> masked video -> bezel -> frame overlay
